Ionian.use: Major key default — bright, familiar pop & folk

Dorian.use: Minor with raised 6th — funk, jazz, rock soloing

Lydian.use: Dreamy major — film scores, prog, floating feel

Mixolydian.use: Dominant major — blues, rock, country grooves

Aeolian.use: Natural minor — sad ballads, metal, classical minor

Locrian.use: Unstable, rare — jazz passing tones, experimental

Harmonic Minor.use: Classical minor — neoclassical metal, dramatic leads

Melodic Minor.use: Jazz minor — fusion, modern jazz improvisation

Major Pentatonic.use: Simple major — country, rock hooks, easy soloing

Minor Pentatonic.use: Blues & rock soloing — omits 2nd and 6th degrees
